---
title: Project Relative SCSS Path (Root)
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["#170229", "project-relpath-marker", "#aabb12"]
---

## Root Document

Control: project `_quarto.yml` uses `./styles/custom-in-styles.scss`,
this root doc should pick up both vapor and the custom SCSS.
